title: Excalibur | Dracolotl support
description: This resource pack redraws the Dracolotl mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Dracolotl](https://modrinth.com/mod/dracolotl) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Credits:**

*   Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
*   tonyandthetrashelementals - Creator of Dracolotl
